analysis_summary.main_task_improved: Find stable inorganic materials suitable as high-voltage protective barrier coatings near power lines, with energy_above_hull between 0.0 and 0.05 eV/atom, band_gap between 3.0 and 20.0 eV, density between 3.0 and 10.0 g/cm3, excluding toxic elements such as Pb, Cd, and Hg. Include plotting in the workflow.
limitations: Summary uses only retrieved fields (band_gap, energy_above_hull, density).
No thermal transport, melting point, oxidation kinetics, toxicity, or mechanical validation included.

final_conclusion: Retrieved 100 materials. The retrieved entries show a spread of energy_above_hull values, with stable or near-stable cases present. Band gap values include wide-gap entries. Density values fall within an observed range consistent with the retrieved set. Some values may require confirmation in the structured summary.
